title: Autonomous AI sounds powerful. Until you lose control. Stan DiLullo ...
full_text:
7 likes, 0 comments - aaseya_it_services on June 16, 2026: "Autonomous AI sounds powerful. Until you lose control.
Stan DiLullo, VP- Sales, said it best - "You can't let AI agents make up their own workflow. Governance and auditability have to be guardrails that are enforced by design."
The market is flooded with fully autonomous AI hype. But if left unchecked:
Governance disappears
Predictability erodes
Compliance is put at risk
Enterprises don't run on black-box decisions. They run on structured workflows, clear process boundaries, and outcomes that are auditable and consistent every time. The future of AI isn't just autonomous, it's governed by design.
Watch the full webinar to see how control, predictability, and governance are built into AI systems from the ground up. https://lnkd.in/dm4TvTPZ
#EnterpriseAI #AIGovernance #AIAgents #ResponsibleAI #PegaAI #Aaseya #AICompliance #DigitalTransformation #PegaWorld #Pega #AgenticAI".
